title: Persistent Awareness
text: Programs built around sustained sensing and monitoring, so awareness is maintained over time rather than demonstrated once.

title: Distributed Infrastructure
text: Capabilities designed to operate across dispersed locations and environments rather than depending on a single fixed point.

title: Autonomous Systems Support
text: Infrastructure that launches, recovers, hosts, and sustains autonomous and uncrewed systems in support of the mission.

title: Modular Mission Capability
text: Programs that adapt as sensors, payloads, and mission requirements change, without redesigning the underlying system.

title: Operational Sustainment
text: Maintenance, logistics, readiness, and lifecycle support treated as part of the program from the outset.

title: Rapid Program Development
text: Structured development against measurable criteria and decision gates, so capability advances on evidence.
